title: Met investigates hundreds of officers after using Palantir AI tool
summary: Met says AI software unearthed rule-breaking ranging from work-from-home violations to suspected corruptionThe Metropolitan police have launched investigations into hundreds of officers after using an AI tool built by the controversial tech company Palantir to root out rogue cops.The software was deployed by the Met over the course of a week, surveilling staff members using data the force has ready access to, unearthing rule-breaking ranging from work-from-home violations to suspected corruption
title_cn: Met 在使用 Palantir AI 工具后对数百名警官进行了调查
summary_cn: 伦敦警察局表示，人工智能软件发现了从在家工作违规到涉嫌腐败等违规行为。
translation:
【标题】Met 在使用 Palantir AI 工具后对数百名警官进行了调查
【摘要】伦敦警察局表示，人工智能软件发现了从在家工作违规到涉嫌腐败等违规行为。
